list.name: Journal WARN/ERROR
list.query:
SELECT extract(epoch from ts) * 1000 AS time, CONCAT(COALESCE(scope,''),' ',COALESCE(swarm_id,''),' ',COALESCE(kind,''),' ',COALESCE(type,'')) AS text, severity AS tags
FROM journal_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND scope = 'SWARM'
  AND severity IN ('WARN','ERROR')
  AND swarm_id ~ '${swarm:regex}'
ORDER BY ts DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 500

list.name: Swarm lifecycle outcomes
list.query:
SELECT extract(epoch from ts) * 1000 AS time, CONCAT(COALESCE(swarm_id,''),' ',COALESCE(type,''),' ',COALESCE(data->>'status','')) AS text, CONCAT('lifecycle,',severity,',',type) AS tags
FROM journal_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
  AND scope = 'SWARM'
  AND kind = 'outcome'
  AND type IN ('swarm-create','swarm-template','swarm-start','swarm-stop','swarm-remove')
  AND swarm_id ~ '${swarm:regex}'
ORDER BY ts DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT swarmId FROM ph_metrics_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) ORDER BY swarmId
list.label: Swarm
list.name: swarm
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT swarmId FROM ph_metrics_samples WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime) ORDER BY swarmId

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  series,
  value_ms
FROM (
  SELECT
    time,
    concat(swarmId, ' | ', label) AS series,
    value_ms
  FROM (
    SELECT
      toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
      swarmId,
      quantilesTDigest(0.50, 0.95, 0.99)(processorDurationMs) AS qs
    FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
    WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
      AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
    GROUP BY time, swarmId
  )
  ARRAY JOIN ['p50', 'p95', 'p99'] AS label, [qs[1], qs[2], qs[3]] AS value_ms
)
ORDER BY time, series

panels.title: Processor Latency Quantiles (p50 / p95 / p99 ms)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(toString(bucket_ms), '-', toString(bucket_ms + 250), ' ms') AS series,
  count() AS txns
FROM (
  SELECT
    eventTime,
    intDiv(toUInt32(greatest(processorDurationMs, 0)), 250) * 250 AS bucket_ms
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
    AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
)
GROUP BY time, bucket_ms
ORDER BY time, bucket_ms

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(instance, ' (', swarmId, ')') AS series,
  argMax(value, eventTime) AS value
FROM ph_metrics_samples
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND metricName = 'ph_processor_success_ratio'
  AND statistic = 'VALUE'
  AND role = 'postprocessor'
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time, series

SELECT
  time,
  series,
  if(seconds > 0, greatest(last_value - first_value, 0) / seconds, 0) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(eventTime, toIntervalSecond(greatest($__interval_s, 60))) AS time,
    concat(instance, ' (', swarmId, ')') AS series,
    dateDiff('second', min(eventTime), max(eventTime)) AS seconds,
    argMin(value, eventTime) AS first_value,
    argMax(value, eventTime) AS last_value
  FROM ph_metrics_samples
  WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
    AND metricName = 'ph_processor_calls_total'
    AND statistic = 'COUNT'
    AND role = 'postprocessor'
    AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
  GROUP BY time, series
)
ORDER BY time, series

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(if(metricName = 'ph_swarm_buffer_guard_depth', 'depth', 'target'), ' ', if(labels['queue'] = '', instance, labels['queue']), ' (', swarmId, ')') AS series,
  argMax(value, eventTime) AS value
FROM ph_metrics_samples
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND metricName IN ('ph_swarm_buffer_guard_depth', 'ph_swarm_buffer_guard_target')
  AND statistic = 'VALUE'
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time, series

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(if(labels['queue'] = '', instance, labels['queue']), ' (', swarmId, ')') AS series,
  argMax(value, eventTime) AS value
FROM ph_metrics_samples
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND metricName = 'ph_swarm_buffer_guard_rate_per_sec'
  AND statistic = 'VALUE'
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time, series

SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time,
  concat(if(labels['queue'] = '', instance, labels['queue']), ' (', swarmId, ')') AS series,
  argMax(value, eventTime) AS value
FROM ph_metrics_samples
WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  AND metricName = 'ph_swarm_buffer_guard_state'
  AND statistic = 'VALUE'
  AND ('${swarm:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${swarm:csv}'), swarmId))
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time, series
